'''panushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avacopan|avacopan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avacopan|avacopan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| panushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pænishith|pænishith]] || [[word:pænishij|pænishij]] || [[word:pænishish|pænishish]] || [[word:pænishi|pænishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:panunushuth|panunushuth]] || [[word:panunushuj|panunushuj]] || [[word:panunushush|panunushush]] || [[word:panunushu|panunushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:panushuth|panushuth]] || [[word:panushuj|panushuj]] || [[word:panushush|panushush]] || [[word:panushu|panushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:panufshuth|panufshuth]] || [[word:panufshuj|panufshuj]] || [[word:panufshush|panufshush]] || [[word:panufshuf|panufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:panushuthu|panushuthu]] || [[word:panushuju|panushuju]] || [[word:panushushu|panushushu]] || [[word:panushuku|panushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:panushuth|panushuth]] || [[word:panushuj|panushuj]] || [[word:panushush|panushush]] || [[word:panushu|panushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:panushuthul|panushuthul]] || [[word:panushujul|panushujul]] || [[word:panushushul|panushushul]] || [[word:panushukul|panushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:panushuthuthu|panushuthuthu]] || [[word:panushujuju|panushujuju]] || [[word:panushushushu|panushushushu]] || [[word:panushuku|panushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:panushuthun|panushuthun]] || [[word:panushujun|panushujun]] || [[word:panushushun|panushushun]] || [[word:panushukun|panushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:panushuthuoro|panushuthuoro]] || [[word:panushujuoro|panushujuoro]] || [[word:panushushuoro|panushushuoro]] || [[word:panushukuoro|panushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
